# T1 test fixtures

All files under this directory are checked-in test fixtures for the
binary-format library.

## `sef_writer/`

Generated by `tool/gen_sef_fixtures.dart`. Hand-verified byte-exact
against Doc 2 §3.2/§3.3 byte maps.

- `inline_marker_24bytes.bin` — `SefWriter.buildInlineMarker()`
- `single_record_32bytes.bin` — `SefWriter.buildSefTrailer(offsetFromSefhToInlineMarker: 0x346B8C)`

## `exif_rewriter/`

Generated by `tool/gen_exif_fixtures.dart`.

- `empty_exif_ifd0.bin` — djimimo-style APP1 (IFD0 has 4 entries, NO
  Make/Model). Forces the slow-path rebuild.
- `full_exif_ifd0.bin` — S23U-style APP1 (Make+Model already present at
  the target ASCII lengths). Exercises the fast path.
- `rewritten_golden.bin` — expected output of fast-path rewrite over
  `full_exif_ifd0.bin`. Used for regression detection.

## `samples/`

Generated by `tool/gen_sample_fixtures.dart`.

- `djimimo_baseline.jpg` (~550 B) — synthetic djimimo-style Motion Photo:
  SOI + djimimo EXIF + XMP + minimal JPEG scan + MP4 trailer (ftyp +
  moov/mvhd @ 0.5 s). No SEF, no Samsung Make. Primary end-to-end input
  for `fix_service_test.dart`.
- `invalid_no_soi.jpg` — 32 random bytes (no FF D8).
- `invalid_truncated.jpg` — SOI + APP0 marker with bogus long length and
  no following payload.
- `no_mp4.jpg` — a minimal JPEG with no trailing MP4 box.

## Large real-world sample (NOT checked in)

The handoff references a 24 MB real djimimo Motion Photo at
`D:\repos\livephoto\dji_export_photo_20260420141649266.jpg` for manual
smoke testing. It is NOT bundled into this repository. Use
`tool/end_to_end_smoke.dart` to run `fix_service.fix()` against it
interactively; the script takes the source path as a command-line arg.

To regenerate ALL fixtures from scratch:

```
dart run tool/gen_sef_fixtures.dart
dart run tool/gen_exif_fixtures.dart
dart run tool/gen_sample_fixtures.dart
```

The synthetic samples are deterministic; any diff in the checked-in
bytes after regeneration indicates that the generator code has drifted
from the doc-specified byte layouts.
